display.purpose: Hero headlines, vision-banner title, mission pull-quote. Currently browser-stock Georgia: a placeholder, not a brand decision.

body.purpose: Long-form paragraphs, card body copy. Capped at 65 to 75 characters per line.

label.purpose: Eyebrow labels, badge text, small print. Always uppercase with 0.08em letter-spacing.

shadows.name: cta-lift
shadows.purpose: Hover lift under the primary CTA on dark sections. Sole shadow in the live system.

motion.name: ease-cinema
motion.purpose: Hero clip-path reveal animation. Slow, cinematic ease.

motion.name: ease-out-soft
motion.purpose: Scroll reveals and slow transitions. Exponential ease-out.

motion.name: ease-base
motion.purpose: Standard easing for state transitions on buttons and links.

components.name: Eyebrow Pill
components.description: Small uppercase label with a pulsing accent dot. The most distinctive component in the system, used as the hero badge on dark sections.
components.html: Rwanda's Leading Non-Profit Oral Health Society
components.css: .ds-eyebrow-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.375rem 1rem; background: rgba(88, 204, 111, 0.15); border: 1px solid rgba(88, 204, 111, 0.28); border-radius: 100px; font-family: 'Google Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 500; color: #58cc6f; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-eyebrow-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: #58cc6f; animation: ds-dot-pulse 2.4s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes ds-dot-pulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); } 50% { opacity: 0.4; transform: scale(0.75); } }

components.name: Primary Button on Dark
components.description: White pill on dark backgrounds. Primary CTA for hero and action bands. Currently the most-used CTA shape; should become the rare strong move rather than the default.
components.html: Explore Our Services
components.css: .ds-btn-primary-dark { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.875rem 1.75rem; background: #ffffff; color: #0a0a0a; font-family: 'Google Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 600; border-radius: 6px; text-decoration: none; letter-spacing: 0.01em; transition: background 160ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), transform 160ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 160ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary-dark:hover { background: #ededed; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 10px 28px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.22); } .ds-btn-primary-dark:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #58cc6f; outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-btn-primary-dark svg { transition: transform 160ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary-dark:hover svg { transform: translateX(4px); }

components.name: Ghost Button on Dark
components.description: Translucent border button for secondary actions on dark sections.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost-dark { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.875rem 1.75rem; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); color: #ffffff; font-family: 'Google Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.35); border-radius: 6px; text-decoration: none; letter-spacing: 0.01em; transition: background 160ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), border-color 160ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-ghost-dark:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14); border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6); } .ds-btn-ghost-dark:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #58cc6f; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Info Card on Cream
components.description: White surface with hairline border, used for the about-page tiles (Where We Operate, Who We Bring Together, Our Reach). Currently leads with emoji glyphs; the snippet here drops the emoji per the Don'ts.
components.html:
Where We Operate

Headquartered in Ngoma, Huye (Southern Province), RDMS conducts programs across Rwanda, from urban clinics and university campuses to rural schools and underserved communities.
components.css: .ds-info-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e3ddd1; border-radius: 12px; padding: 1.75rem; max-width: 32rem; } .ds-info-card-title { font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 400; color: #0a0a0a; line-height: 1.2; margin: 0 0 0.5rem 0; } .ds-info-card-body { font-family: 'Google Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.95rem; color: #2a2a2a; line-height: 1.65; margin: 0; max-width: 65ch; }

components.name: Vision Banner
components.description: Full-bleed band with a deep-green linear gradient, white display headline, white body. The cleanest custom moment in the live system.
components.html:
Our Vision

Advancing Oral & Public Health Through Innovation and Partnership

RDMS Rwanda is a nonprofit, professional organization based in Ngoma, Huye, in the south of Rwanda. It unites dental and medical students and professionals to promote oral and public health through outreach, research, innovation, and partnerships that advance healthcare in Rwanda and beyond.
components.css: .ds-vision-banner { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1c3a2c, #3d6b52); border-radius: 20px; padding: 3rem; color: #ffffff; max-width: 64rem; } .ds-vision-eyebrow { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.375rem 1rem; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25); border-radius: 100px; font-family: 'Google Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 500; color: #a9e0b6; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 1.25rem; } .ds-vision-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: #a9e0b6; } .ds-vision-headline { font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif; font-size: clamp(1.75rem, 3.5vw, 2.6rem); font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.2; letter-spacing: -0.01em; margin: 0 0 1rem 0; max-width: 22ch; } .ds-vision-body { font-family: 'Google Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.7; margin: 0; max-width: 65ch; opacity: 0.9; }

narrative.overview:
The system as it ships today is a layered surface. A Webflow template, cloned originally from tech-ish.org (a Kenyan tech blog), provides the structural foundation, with two RDMS-specific overlays painted on top: local-overrides.css for the homepage and assets/css/about.css for the about page. The result is a working site, but a system in transition: the bones of the template are still visible underneath the rebrand.

The current visual personality reads as warm, light-mode, evidence-led where it works and clinical-template where it does not. The cream paper background carries the long-form material; deep-green and dark navy bands punctuate the scroll for the hero, vision, and call-to-action moments. The accent green is the loudest voice in the palette and appears on most interactive elements.

What this system explicitly rejects, per PRODUCT.md: white-savior NGO aesthetic, generic healthcare blue-and-teal, tech-startup template moves, Africa-stock-photo, and any look that reads as templated or AI-generated. The current implementation has not fully escaped its template origins; that is the central tension this document records.
keyCharacteristics: Two-mode site: long-form on warm cream, marketing punctuation on dark green/navy.
One dominant accent (cooperative-green, #58cc6f) carrying both action and decoration.
Typography is utilitarian: stock Georgia plus Google Sans, no committed display face.
Spacing and radii are ad-hoc; there is no shared scale across the live CSS.
A second, dead design system (styles.css) sits in the repo unlinked. It must be removed.
Implementation depth: heavy. Webflow IX, GSAP, ScrollTrigger, UnicornStudio, Leaflet all run on the homepage.

rules.name: The Two-Zone Rule
rules.body: The site lives in two modes: cream-paper for long-form content (about, story, values, leadership) and dark-band for hero, vision, mission, and CTA moments. A section commits to one mode or the other; mid-section transitions between cream and dark only happen at hard section breaks.

rules.name: The One Green Discipline
rules.body: When the cooperative green and the field-green deep both appear on the same surface, they read as 'two greens' rather than as a deliberate scale. Pick one per section based on background luminance: cooperative green on dark surfaces, field-green-deep on cream.

rules.name: The No-Default-Display Rule
rules.body: Georgia is a default. Default is not a brand decision. The display face is the highest-leverage typographic move available; it should be a chosen face that signals proudly-Rwandan and modern-African voice. Until that choice is made, Georgia is a placeholder, not a position.

rules.name: The Hairline Rule
rules.body: On cream backgrounds, separation is a 1px #e3ddd1 border. Not a shadow. Shadows on cream paper read as photocopy, not paper.

rules.name: The Band-Color Rule
rules.body: On dark surfaces, separation between sections is full-bleed background color change, not a card or a shadow. The band IS the elevation.

dos: Do keep cream paper (#f6f3ec) as the dominant background for long-form material. The cream + dark-band rhythm is the strongest structural decision in the current system.
Do lead with field-green-deep (#1f6b3a) for institutional trust signals on cream; reserve cooperative-green (#58cc6f) for moments that genuinely need brightness.
Do use the eyebrow-pill-with-pulsing-dot pattern. It is the most distinctive component the system has.
Do cap body line length at 65 to 75 characters on cards and long-form sections.
Do treat real RDMS data (RDB Code, founded date, district names, member count) as primary visual material per PRODUCT.md design principle 2.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion for the UnicornStudio background, the clip-path video reveal, and all GSAP / ScrollTrigger animations.
Do subset and self-host any future webfont; the current Google Fonts dependency is a render-blocking cost on 3G/4G.
donts: Don't ship Georgia as the display face long-term. Per PRODUCT.md anti-reference 5, browser-stock serif on a non-profit healthcare site is a tell.

Don't keep styles.css in the repo. It is unlinked, contains the abandoned Fraunces + DM Sans + sage-green tech-blog system from the tech-ish.org clone, and is exactly the tech-startup template anti-reference. Delete it.
Don't use #ffffff and #000000 literally. Tint every neutral toward the brand hue (chroma 0.005 to 0.01 in OKLCH terms).
Don't use emoji glyphs as section-card iconography. Per PRODUCT.md anti-reference 5, this reads templated.
Don't repeat the icon-plus-heading-plus-paragraph card pattern across multiple sections.
Don't use gradient text. Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored stripe.
Don't lean on glassmorphism or backdrop-filter blurs as decoration.
Don't add side-by-side card grids of identical info cards for new sections.
Don't use stock Africa imagery. Use field photography from RDMS programs in Huye, Ngoma, the Southern Province.
Don't ship hero-metric 'big number, small label, supporting stats, gradient accent' patterns.
Don't rely on Webflow IX for primary motion. It is a 200KB+ runtime that costs heavily on 3G.
